Class KeyboardArcade

java.lang.Object
KeyboardArcade
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeyListener, EventListener
public class KeyboardArcade extends Object implements KeyListener
Implements the KeyListener interface to handle keyboard events. This class is designed to work with the MG2D library and is intended to be used in conjunction with the Board class to manage keyboard input for the game. Joysticks : joyJ1 - joyJ1Up - joyJ1Down - joyJ1Left - joyJ1Right Buttons : ButtonJ1 (bottom) - ButtonJ1A -> dig - ButtonJ1B -> flag - ButtonJ1C (top) - ButtonJ1X -> back - ButtonJ1Y -> difficulty - ButtonJ1Z
